data.title: Ecuador offers cash to buy back certain notes, per announcement on Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Quito, Ecuador, the Republic of Ecuador disclosed its commencement of a cash offer to buy back notes from registered holders or beneficial owners. Each holder has the opportunity to participate in this offer. The Republic aims to purchase a specific number of notes, as detailed in the current announcement.

data.title: Equifax's Q3 2025 Market Pulse Index hits 61.6, signaling financial improvement in lower credit tiers, notably among Gen Z.
data.description: In Atlanta, on January 16, 2026, Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) announced the findings from the third quarter of 2025 Market Pulse Index. The index showed a moderate increase to 61.6 by the end of September 2025. The report highlighted significant improvements among Gen Z individuals, although there was notable variability in the data.

data.title: Austin School Fair on Jan. 31 at 11:00 AM to showcase over 40 public and private school options in one place for parents in Austin.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Austin, Texas, parents have the opportunity to explore various school options for their children on January 31. The Austin School Fair will take place at the Bullock Texas State History Museum starting at 11:00 AM. Over 40 public and private schools will be showcased, offering valuable information to families.

data.title: SU Group Holdings reports 5.6% revenue growth in FY 2025 driven by security services demand. Initiatives for long-term growth.
data.description: SU Group Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: SUGP) reported a 5.6% increase in revenue compared to the previous year, primarily driven by high demand for security-related engineering services. The company, based in Hong Kong, announced these results on January 16, 2026, highlighting its focus on long-term growth and the introduction of new initiatives.

data.title: D.C. event on Jan. 31 to showcase schools with 500-1,000 attendees expected. Opportunity for families to explore educational options.
data.description: Approximately 500 to 1,000 people are anticipated to attend a community event in Washington on January 31, 2026. The event will be a family-oriented afternoon with school displays, interactive games, and hands-on activities. Parents in the D.C. area will have the opportunity to explore a variety of school options for their children in one convenient location.

data.title: TikTok coins are meme coins on TikTok, launched on Pump Fun and traded on Solana, based on viral trends.
data.description: TikTok coins are being touted as "the next big thing in the cryptocurrency world," catching even seasoned traders like crypto expert Jordan Fish off guard. These coins, which are promoted on TikTok instead of conventional platforms like X, Telegram, or Discord, typically debut on Pump Fun (CRYPTO: PUMP) and are traded on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL ). They are influenced by viral TikTok trends, memes, and Gen Z culture rather than traditional crypto themes. Alon Cohen, the founder of Pump Fun, has already identified this emerging trend. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Santa Ana School Fair on Jan. 31, 2026, will feature #30+ schools for Orange County parents at Santa Ana College.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, on January 16, 2026, parents in Orange County have the opportunity to explore over 30 different schools for their children in one convenient location. The Santa Ana School fair will commence at 11:00 am on Saturday, January 31, at the Santa Ana College campus.

data.title: Digital Wealth Partners picks Two Prime to oversee $250M in Bitcoin holdings for clients, providing low-volatility returns.
data.description: In a recent press release, Two Prime Inc., a renowned provider of bitcoin financial services catering to institutional investors, revealed that Digital Wealth Partners (DWP) has chosen them to oversee around $250 million worth of bitcoin holdings for their clients. DWP, an established Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) focusing on digital assets, has entrusted Two Prime with managing this substantial sum. Through this collaboration, the DWP bitcoin strategy, facilitated by Two Prime, aims to generate stable, bitcoin-based returns for their clientele, offering a solution that prioritizes low volatility in the digital asset market.

data.title: Hootology achieves growth with new hires, client wins, & product advancements post July launch of HOOQZ, an AI platform for qualitative insights at quantitative scale.
data.description: A market research platform called Hootology, based in New York, has experienced notable expansion following the recent debut of HOOQZ in July. HOOQZ is an AI-driven platform designed for conducting engaging discussions in virtual settings to obtain qualitative insights on a large scale. The company has onboarded several experienced professionals from senior positions in brand, marketing, and research sectors, lured by the innovative methodology and effectiveness of HOOQZ.

data.title: Parents in Allegheny County can explore various school options for kids at the Pittsburgh School Fair on Jan. 31 at Sheraton Hotel.
data.description: Discover a variety of schooling options for children in Allegheny County at the upcoming Pittsburgh School Fair on Jan. 31. The event will be held at the Sheraton Pittsburgh Hotel at Station Square, starting at 11:00 AM. Parents from the region will have the opportunity to explore numerous schools all under one roof on this day. Don't miss this chance to gather information and make informed decisions about your child's education.

data.title: Profusa launches Lumee Tissue Oxygen healthcare research offerings for immediate revenue generation with products available commercially.
data.description: Commercially available research-use-only offerings now provide companies with the opportunity to quickly generate revenue through product and service sales. These offerings are designed specifically for research purposes and are accessible to businesses seeking to capitalize on this market.

data.title: Henlius reveals "Globalisation 2.0" plan and innovation roadmap at JPM 2026. Key event held in San Francisco from Jan 12 to 15.
data.description: Recently in San Francisco, the 44th J.P.Morgan Healthcare Conference (JPMHC) took place from January 12 to 15, 2026. On January 15, during the conference, Dr. Jason Zhu, Executive Director and Chief Executive Officer of Shanghai Henlius Biotech, spoke about significant advancements in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Wipro reports Q3 revenue of 235.6 billion rupees, up 5.5% YoY, with IT Services revenue at $2.635 billion. Margins improve.
data.description: Wipro Ltd (NYSE: WIT) released financial data for the third quarter of fiscal 2026, with a gross revenue of 235.6 billion rupees ($2.622 billion), marking a 5.5% increase from the previous year. The IT Services revenue grew by 0.2% year over year to $2.635 billion. Earnings per share were reported at 4 cents, meeting the anticipated figures. However, adjusted constant-currency revenue in the IT Services segment fell by 1.2% compared to the previous year. The operating margin for IT Services improved to 17.6%, a 10 basis points rise from the previous year.
